name: Task Force on Climate-related Financial Disclosures Recommendations
issuingBody: Financial Stability Board (FSB) Task Force on Climate-related Financial Disclosures

disclosures.name: Board oversight of climate-related risks and opportunities
disclosures.description: Describe the board's oversight of climate-related risks and opportunities.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe the board's oversight of climate-related risks and opportunities, including processes by which the board is informed, frequency of consideration, and how the board monitors and oversees progress.

disclosures.name: Management's role in assessing and managing climate-related risks and opportunities
disclosures.description: Describe management's role in assessing and managing climate-related risks and opportunities.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe management's role in assessing and managing climate-related risks and opportunities, including organizational structure, processes for informing management, and how management monitors climate-related issues.

disclosures.name: Climate-related risks and opportunities identified
disclosures.description: Describe the climate-related risks and opportunities the organization has identified over the short, medium, and long term.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe the climate-related risks and opportunities identified over the short, medium, and long term, including physical risks (acute and chronic) and transition risks (policy, legal, technology, market, reputation).

disclosures.name: Impact on organization's businesses, strategy, and financial planning
disclosures.description: Describe the impact of climate-related risks and opportunities on the organization's businesses, strategy, and financial planning.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe how climate-related risks and opportunities have influenced the organization's businesses, strategy, and financial planning, including impacts on products/services, supply chain, adaptation/mitigation activities, R&D expenditures, and operations.

disclosures.name: Resilience of strategy under different climate-related scenarios
disclosures.description: Describe the resilience of the organization's strategy, taking into consideration different climate-related scenarios, including a 2°C or lower scenario.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe the resilience of the organization's strategy using climate-related scenario analysis covering a 2°C or lower scenario. Include where the organization believes its strategies may be affected by climate-related risks and opportunities.

disclosures.name: Processes for identifying and assessing climate-related risks
disclosures.description: Describe the organization's processes for identifying and assessing climate-related risks.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe the processes for identifying and assessing climate-related risks, including how the organization determines the relative significance of climate-related risks in relation to other risks.

disclosures.name: Processes for managing climate-related risks
disclosures.description: Describe the organization's processes for managing climate-related risks.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe the processes for managing climate-related risks, including how the organization makes decisions to mitigate, transfer, accept, or control those risks.

disclosures.name: Integration into overall risk management
disclosures.description: Describe how processes for identifying, assessing, and managing climate-related risks are integrated into the organization's overall risk management.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe how the processes for identifying, assessing, and managing climate-related risks are integrated into the organization's overall risk management framework.

disclosures.name: Metrics used to assess climate-related risks and opportunities
disclosures.description: Disclose the metrics used by the organization to assess climate-related risks and opportunities in line with its strategy and risk management process.
disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose Scope 1, Scope 2, and if appropriate, Scope 3 GHG emissions and the related risks. Disclose key climate-related metrics such as water usage, energy usage, and land use.

disclosures.name: Targets used to manage climate-related risks and opportunities
disclosures.description: Describe the targets used by the organization to manage climate-related risks and opportunities and performance against targets.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe targets used to manage climate-related risks and opportunities and performance against those targets. Include key targets such as GHG emissions targets, water usage, energy usage.
